title: It's in the Air
writer: Byron Morgan, Lew Lipton, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: Jack Benny, Ted Healy, Una Merkel
plot: Calvin Churchill, a confidence-man, and his sidekick/stooge, "Clip" McGurk, are being pursued by an Internal Revenue agent, Henry Potke, for their failure to file an income-tax on the advice of a shyster lawyer. They are hiding ou...
